rulings.Case Title: JAMES AUSTIN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 29, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTs RENKA PROP LLC and JULIA MWANGI's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED. Default entered on July 28, 2017 is set aside. Defendants shall file answers no later than January 3, 2018. Defendants to appear on December 29, 2017 at 9:30 a.m. to present a proposed order in conformity with this tentative ruling. = (501/CFH)
